articles.title: NVIDIA Announces Next-Gen Blackwell Architecture Performance Gains
articles.body: NVIDIA unveils Blackwell GPU architecture breaking performance records with 30% higher throughput on AI inference tasks. Analysts raise price targets following announcement.

articles.title: Eli Lilly's Mounjaro Obesity Sales Accelerate Beyond Expectations
articles.body: LLY reports tirzepatide sales surge to $4.2B annually, positioning Mounjaro as fastest-growing pharmaceutical in history. Guidance raised 18% for FY2026.

articles.title: Microsoft Azure Cloud Revenue Grows 28% YoY, Beats Targets
articles.body: MSFT's cloud division shows accelerating growth as enterprise Copilot adoption gains momentum. Management guides 32% growth for next quarter.

articles.title: JPMorgan Reports Q1 Performance, Net Interest Margin Stable
articles.body: JPM delivered strong Q1 earnings with net interest margin at 1.87%, surprising to the upside. Investment banking revenues surge 32% as M&A market heats up.

articles.title: FTC Advances AI Antitrust Probe Against Major Tech Giants
articles.body: FTC escalates investigation into AI business practices of MSFT, GOOGL, and AMZN. Potential regulatory headwinds could limit cloud dominance strategies.

articles.title: Tesla Cybertruck Production Ramp Accelerating, Guidance Raised
articles.body: TSLA increases Cybertruck production forecast to 500K units annually. Supply chain improvements and manufacturing efficiency gains support accelerated timeline.

commentary.outlook: S&P 500 approaches new all-time highs on easing inflation expectations and strong corporate earnings. Fed policy remains data-dependent heading into March FOMC meeting.
positives: Fed likely to pause or cut rates
